name: Cat Journey
short_description: What interesting story will happen when a little cat falls asleep on the sofa and goes to an underground city?
detailed_description:
A little cat fell asleep on the sofa and later arrived at an underground city where it had to unravel mysteries and face a complex and captivating storyline.


《Cat Journey》 "is a third person game that explores an underground city with a cat as the protagonist. There are many robot residents here, and it is necessary to find a way to communicate and understand the city with them.


Explore a cyberpunk city filled with neon lights and complex networks. From bustling city centers to dark slums, every place has different people and events waiting for you to discover.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Russian, Turkish, Japanese, Polish, Simplified Chinese, Finnish
